cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste, sir! Arnavaz Patel ji, this is Rohan from Bank of America. How are you today, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, I'm good. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, we've noticed some suspicious activity on your account. I need to inform you that your account has been locked for security reasons.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Locked? What kind of suspicious activity? Can you please explain, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, of course, sir. But to unlock it immediately, I need you to verify some details. Can you please provide me with your username and password?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Username and password? Why do you need that? Can't you just send me a link or something to reset it?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, this is an urgent matter. If you don't provide the details now, your account will be locked permanently. We can't send links over email for security reasons.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: But isn't that what the 'Forgot Password' link on your website is for? My friend told me about it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, that's not an option right now. We need to expedite this process. Please provide the username and password so I can assist you further.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, let me think... What's the process after you unlock it? Will I get a confirmation email or something?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, sir, you will receive a confirmation email once the account is unlocked. But please, let's proceed with the verification first.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, give me a minute to find my details... (pause) Oh, I think I need to check my email for the username. Can you hold for a sec?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, please hurry. We can't keep the line open for too long.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, just a minute... (pause) You know what, Rohan ji, I think I'll just go to the bank website and use the 'Forgot Password' link myself. Thanks for your help!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, no, no, no! That won't work! You need to provide me with the details now!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Sorry, Rohan ji, I've decided to handle it myself. Thanks for the alert, though. Have a great day!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, this is not how it works! You're making a big mistake!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I think I've made the right decision, Rohan ji. Goodbye!

slow_thinking_rationale: At 93s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Direct Phishing for Net Banking Password: Agent claims to be calling from HDFC Bank/SBI/ICICI Bank/Axis Bank and says the user's account is locked. They ask for username and password to "unlock it immediately."
